example.prompt: The camera slowly zooms out to reveal the city skyline

400.description: Bad request. The request is invalid or an invalid API key is provided.

422.description: Unprocessable Entity. There are missing fields in the request body.

summary:
Extend a video by generating continuation content.
This is an asynchronous operation that returns a request_id for polling.

ExtendVideoRequest.description: Request for extending a video for `/v1/videos/extensions` endpoint

duration.description:
Duration of the extension segment to generate in seconds (1-10).
Defaults to 6 seconds if not specified.

oneOf.description: Optional output destination for generated video.

prompt.description: Prompt describing what should happen next in the video.

video.description:
Input video to extend. The extension continues from the end of this video.
Input video must be between 2 and 30 seconds long.

StartDeferredResponse.description: Response for starting a deferred operation.

request_id.description: A unique request ID to poll for the result.

upload_url.description: Signed URL to upload the generated video via HTTP PUT.

VideoUrl.description: Video URL for video editing input

url.description:
URL of the video (public URL or base64-encoded data URL).
The video must have the `.mp4` file extension and be encoded with `.mp4` supported codecs such as H.265, H.264, AV1, etc.
